<!-- tbl_01 -->
| Task | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| Selection | Specification of a target object to which a command will be applied. Includes picking the object and confirming. |
| Manipulation | Change the attributes of a target object by directly manipulating its state (e.g., switch state on/off, pressing a 3D button) |
| Transformation | Apply a direct geometrical transformation to a virtual object (i.e., position, rotation, and scale) |
| Creation | Change the number of active scene objects by creating or destroying objects |
| Modification | Change the intrinsic properties of an object (e.g., appearance) |
| Navigation | Change the user viewpoint (e.g., walking, teleporting) |
| System Control | Issuing commands to the application |
| Symbolic Input | Character input or editing |

<!-- tbl_02 -->
| Criteria | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| IC1 | The study title, abstract or keywords matches the search query and is indexed on one of the queried databases (refer to Sect. 2.2 for a detailed description). |
| IC2 | The study is relevant for this systematic review and is not a result of the search query (i.e., manually added). |
| EC1 | The document is a duplicate |
| EC2 | The document is not a research paper |
| EC3 | The study's full-text is not available |
| EC4 | The study is not written in English |
| EC5 | The study's subject does not consider HCI |
| EC6 | The study's subject does not consider a valid interaction task (as defined in Table 1, excluding navigation) |
| EC7 | The study does not consider a hands-free interaction method |
| EC8 | The study does not consider immersive VR |
| EC9 | The study does not consider an implementation of the interaction method |

<!-- tbl_03 -->
Caption: shows the studies divided by quality group. The number of studies with low quality (22) indicates that there is still a need for improvement of scientific research in this area, namely regarding the used methodologies for evaluation (more on Sect. 3.8).

| :--- | :--- | :--- |
